title: cymbopogon procerus
intro: Cymbopogon procerus is a species of grass in the genus Cymbopogon, commonly known as lemongrass oil grass. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cymbopogon procerus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and capsules.
